sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, regionToName(1, 'en')), (2, regionToName(2, 'en'));
UPDATE regions SET name = regionToName(3, 'en') WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, name FROM regions WHERE name != '';
SELECT regionToName(number::UInt32, 'fr') AS region_name FROM numbers(0, 10);
